title: Trump Misstates Facts on Charlotte Refugee Case
summary: Trump's claim about the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case being an immigrant is false; the suspect is a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the spread of misinformation and its potential impact on immigration debates and local perceptions.
